Video.summary: A mom, addicted to PCP, repeatedly abuses her daughter. She even forced her daughter to lie about her abusive boyfriend just so he could get out of jail.
Video.title: My Mom Made Me Lie

Image.alt: My Mom Made Me Lie
My Mom Made Me Lie
My Mom Made Me Lie

Video.summary: Jazzy wants a threesome with her best friend and her boyfriend; Danielle's baby daddy hooked up with her good friend; Marra's big secret explodes in his face.
Video.title: Love Predictions ... Threesomes

Image.alt: Love Predictions ... Threesomes
Love Predictions ... Threesomes
Love Predictions ... Threesomes

Video.summary: Angel claims that her father Ronald abused her sexually, forced her to do drugs and even got her addicted to crack when she was 18. His other daughter Tracy also claims he’s tried to abuse her several times, but Ronald says he’s innocent!
Video.title: Devil Dad

Image.alt: Devil Dad
Devil Dad
Devil Dad

Video.summary: Kim and Kristie are identical twins and Kristie is planning to marry Michael but there’s a catch. Later Louis has some explaining to do. His lover of 8 years has just informed his wife of their affair!
Video.title: My Twin Slept With My Man!

Image.alt: My Twin Slept With My Man!
My Twin Slept With My Man!
My Twin Slept With My Man!

Video.summary: Gloria thinks her sister's apparent drug-overdose death was not an accident, and that her other sister may be responsible.
Video.title: Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?

Image.alt: Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?
Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?
Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?

Video.summary: A man takes a lie-detector test after being accused of hurting his girlfriend's child.
Video.title: You Failed Five Times?

Image.alt: You Failed Five Times?
You Failed Five Times?
You Failed Five Times?

Video.summary: Angelica says John "checks her" for signs of cheating every time she comes home. She wants a lie detector test to prove she's been faithful! Then, Ashley she found out that her boyfriend, TJ, had cheated on her when she was 8 months pregnant.
Video.title: Porn, Confessions, and Revenge Sex

Image.alt: Porn, Confessions, and Revenge Sex
Porn, Confessions, and Revenge Sex
Porn, Confessions, and Revenge Sex

Video.summary: Cammie is here to find out once and for all if her ex sexually abused their 2-year-old daughter. Her doctor’s examination showed signs of sexual abuse. Her ex denies these allegations. But what will Steve’s lie detector test reveal?
Video.title: Daddy Didn't Do Anything to Her

Image.alt: Daddy Didn't Do Anything to Her
Daddy Didn't Do Anything to Her
Daddy Didn't Do Anything to Her

Video.summary: Jennifer fears that her husband Tim is addicted to teenage porn and has heard rumors of him sneaking underage girls into their house. Is Amanda’s man a child molester and peeping Tom? How will these wives react to the lie detector test results?
Video.title: Does My Husband Have a Creepy Addiction?

Image.alt: Does My Husband Have a Creepy Addiction?
Does My Husband Have a Creepy Addiction?
Does My Husband Have a Creepy Addiction?

Video.summary: They say the "terrible teens" can be a trying time for parents. But 13 year old Kendra is really giving her parents a run for their money. Her father says that she's been caught smoking weed, having sex and even cutting herself.
Video.title: Drugs and Sex At 13?

Image.alt: Drugs and Sex At 13?
Drugs and Sex At 13?
Drugs and Sex At 13?

Video.summary: Ashley alleges that her fiancé John has repeatedly abused both her and her son. To make matters worse, this isn't John's first incident with abuse, as his former girlfriend, another Ashley, was also abused and is now here to save her friend.
Video.title: Will You Stay To Get Beat?

Image.alt: Will You Stay To Get Beat?
Will You Stay To Get Beat?
Will You Stay To Get Beat?

Video.summary: Joe met a woman on a phone chat line. A couple of months later, she revealed she was pregnant with his child.
Video.title: These DNA Results will Floor You

Image.alt: These DNA Results will Floor You
These DNA Results will Floor You
These DNA Results will Floor You

Video.summary: Sex addict Princess wants to confess to her fiance about her secret double life.
Video.title: I Need to Tell Him I Cheated 71 Times

I Need to Tell Him I Cheated 71 Times
I Need to Tell Him I Cheated 71 Times

Video.summary: Chris fears that his girlfriend is still sleeping with her abusive ex; Quay thinks constant arguments over cheating caused her to miscarry her twins; Raena says her man accuses her of cheating with every man she happens to be around.
Video.title: Blindsided by Results

Blindsided by Results

Video.summary: A 17-year-old and her mother are prostitutes.

Video.summary: Keema wants to propose to the father of her child; Eleni went through her boyfriend's cell phone and found revealing text messages from another woman; Mike wants to keep his family intact, but his baby's mother has a confession to make.
Video.title: Young Mom Meltdown

Young Mom Meltdown

Video.summary: Stripper Brittany confronts a co-worker who hooked up with one of Brittany's clients; Bebo's baby-mama confesses to sleeping with his best friend; three guests provide a surprise.

Battle Royale With Cheese

Video.summary: A woman thinks her friend is sleeping with someone she is also dating; a man wants his girlfriend back after she leaves; a woman tries to save her friend from what she thinks is a bad relationship.
